Story 5 – Timo and the Floating Feather Timo
👆 Tap any highlighted word to learn it

Timo was a tiny brown hedgehog who loved collecting interesting things from the forest. One cold morning, he found a blue feather gently floating in the air, as if it were dancing. Curious, he reached for it, but the feather drifted away.

“Hey! Come back!” Timo giggled and chased it through the snowy trees.

The feather led him to a small robin sitting on a frozen branch, looking worried.

“That feather is mine,” the robin chirped. “A strong wind blew it away, and now I can’t finish my warm nest.”

Timo’s heart softened. “Let me help you.”

He carefully carried the feather back, and together they tucked it into the robin’s nest. Soon the nest looked warm and safe again.

“You saved my home,” the robin said gratefully.

Timo smiled proudly. “Everyone needs help sometimes.”

Moral: Helping others builds friendships that warm even the coldest days.
